name: Zucchini Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: 1 large zucchini, cut into 3/4 in. slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini into 3/4 inch pieces.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté until the onion is transparent.
3. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside. Add tomatoes to the pan, bring to a boil, then simmer for half an hour.
4. Stir in tomato paste diluted with three cans of water. Simmer for at least one hour, adding oregano, basil, and parsley to taste. Continue simmering for a few minutes longer.
5. Dredge zucchini slices in flour and sauté lightly in the pan until golden brown on both sides.
6. Arrange zucchini slices in a baking dish, layer with sauce, parmesan cheese, then repeat with remaining zucchini. Top with mozzarella cheese.
7. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes. Uncover for the last 15 minutes of cooking time.
